form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start favourite; won by 3 len at this track March 18 over 1207m defeating Music Clarifcation carrying 55kg at $1.50. The race before that 2nd in a small field at this track on February 19 over 1207m, 1.5 len behind I Am Rue carrying 55.5kg at $5.60. Big chance to make it back-to-back successes.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 3rd of 7 at Parx on February 18 over 1207m, 8 len behind Byebyejealouseye carrying 55.5kg at $7.50. Second run from a spell favourite; won by 10 len at Parx March 16 over 1308m defeating Nezy's Girl carrying 55.5kg at $2.10. Last-start winner who can measure up again.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at this track on March 26 over 1207m, 2.25 len behind Western Woman carrying 54.5kg at $1.30. The race before that in a small field at Laurel on February 28 over 1609m, 6 len behind Stress Reliever carrying 57kg at $3.60. Good effort last start and can build on that performance.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming in a small field at Laurel on February 22 over 1207m, 4 len behind Kuaga with 55kg at $3.20. Second-up favourite; won by 3 len at this track March 26 over 1609m defeating Sugar Princess carrying 54.5kg at $1.40. Happy enough to avoid.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up sat on the pace when 3rd of 7 at this track on February 26 over 1207m, 5 len behind Normandy Life with 54.5kg at $8.20. Last start ran last of 9 at Parx on March 12 over 1308m, 9 len behind Missy Sixtysix with 55.5kg at $39.30. Can do a lot better than that last run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Third-up today. First-up sat on the pace when 3rd of 7 at this track on February 26 over 1207m, 5 len behind Normandy Life with 54.5kg at $8.20. Last start ran last of 9 at Parx on March 12 over 1308m, 9 len behind Missy Sixtysix with 55.5kg at $39.30. Can do a lot better than that last run.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 37-day let-up. First-up after four months tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 7 at Parx on March 2 over 1308m, 11 len behind Little Cocoa Bean carrying 56.5kg at $3.50. Previously second-up 4th of 9 at Oaklawn Park on February 8 2025 over 1207m, 11 len behind Nuit Magique carrying 56.5kg at $5.60. Fitter again and a winning hope.
